summary: Iteration 19: All 9 PDF features tested. Backend 7/7 PASS. Frontend all flows verified successfully.
critical_code_review_comments: From iteration_18: AssessmentV2Taking.jsx is still not wired to App.js route /portal/assessments/:sessionId — new Excel/Import buttons unreachable by users. Main agent should replace old AssessmentTaking import with AssessmentV2Taking in App.js.
seed_data_creation: company_name set to 'TEST Company Updated 2026' in cms_settings via PUT /api/admin/pdf-config
context_for_next_testing_agent: All PDF features work end-to-end. Backend: GET /api/admin/pdf-config returns config with required keys, PUT persists values, GET /api/admin/pdf-config/preview returns PDF >3000 bytes, GET /api/assessment/sessions/{id}/export-pdf works for both draft and submitted sessions. Frontend: /portal/admin/pdf-settings loads correctly, sidebar has PDF Settings nav link under CRM, Generate Preview button works (iframe displays PDF), Save config shows success toast. Outstanding from iter18: AssessmentV2Taking.jsx not in App.js route.
rca_of_issue: No new issues found. All PDF CMS features implemented correctly.
